content.raw:
AI services

AI strategy for people who still care about culture.

I help organizations, creative teams, schools, civic groups, and community builders move from AI pressure to practical fluency. The work is part strategy, part training, part sensemaking, and part creative courage.

This is not generic prompt-hacking. It is hands-on capacity building for people who need to use new tools without surrendering judgment, taste, responsibility, or trust.

How I can help

AI strategy

Map where AI can actually help, where it should stay out, and how your team can move without chaos or vendor fog.

Training and workshops

Build practical AI fluency through live demos, workflow labs, and exercises people can use the next day.

Community systems

Design the rooms, rituals, publishing loops, and lightweight infrastructure that help ecosystems learn in public.

Keynotes and briefings

Give your audience a useful, human, slightly electric way to understand what AI means for their work.

Proof in motion

BC + AI Ecosystem

Grassroots AI community infrastructure for builders, artists, educators, researchers, and policy people across British Columbia.

Creative AI keynotes

Talks and workshops that make complicated technology feel usable without sanding off the weird human parts.

Start here

Book an AI strategy session

Bring me the room, the audience, the workflow, or the messy question. I will help you find the useful edge and turn it into a plan people can actually act on.

Start a conversation
